SourceProxy.name: SHYXMeshChecker
SourceProxy.label: SHYX Mesh Checker

Documentation.short_help: Mark non-manifold soup edges, boundary cycles, and self-intersecting triangles.

SourceProxy.Documentation: Outputs diagnostic geometry on a single vtkPolyData: VTK_LINE cells for polygon-soup edges incident to more than two faces (SHYX_CheckReason=1), VTK_POLY_LINE cells for mesh boundary / hole cycles (reason=2), and VTK_TRIANGLE cells for faces reported by CGAL PMP::self_intersections (reason=3). Cell array SHYX_CheckReason encodes the category. Boundary and self-intersection checks require a CGAL-valid polygon mesh from the soup; pure triangle mesh is required for self-intersection enumeration.

IntVectorProperty.name: CheckOrient
IntVectorProperty.label: Check / unify orientation (orient_polygon_soup)
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When on, runs CGAL orient_polygon_soup on the polygon soup before the combinatorial mesh test.

IntVectorProperty.name: AttemptOrientRepair
IntVectorProperty.label: Attempt soup repair (repair_polygon_soup)
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When on, runs CGAL repair_polygon_soup after optional orient (splits non-manifold vertices, etc.) to improve chances that polygon_soup_to_polygon_mesh succeeds.

IntVectorProperty.name: LogSteps
IntVectorProperty.label: Log steps (Output Messages)
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When on, prints per-step diagnostics to the ParaView Output Messages window (vtkWarningMacro).
